title: Stop weak cipher usage
remediation:
1. Review this security control list of exposed entities.
2. Research why the identified clients and servers are using weak ciphers.
3. Remediate the issues and disable use of RC4 and/or other weak ciphers (such as DES/3DES).
To achieve a full score, you must remediate all exposed entities.
remediationImpact: A user or an application that relies on these types of weak ciphers may stop functioning.
